files.Summary: Represents a request for AI completion.

files.Summary: Represents a response from an AI completion request.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.AI.Models.Embedding

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.AI.Models.UsageStats
files.Summary: Represents usage statistics for a completion.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.AI.PromptTemplate
files.Summary: Represents a prompt template with metadata and variable placeholders.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.CQRS.Handlers.ICommandHandler<TCommand, TResponse>

files.Summary: Interface for event store implementations. Provides methods for storing and retrieving domain events with comprehensive functionality.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.EventSourcing.ISnapshotStore

files.Summary: Provides standard error definitions for identity operations.

files.Summary: Represents an organization in the identity system for multi-tenancy support.

files.Summary: Represents a user in the identity system.

files.Summary: Represents a member of an organization.

files.Summary: Represents a paginated result set.

files.Summary: Represents a request to create a new user.

files.Summary: Represents a request to list users with pagination and filtering.

files.Summary: Represents information extracted from a validated token.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Infrastructure.IUnitOfWork
files.Summary: Interface for the Unit of Work pattern. Manages transactions and coordinates changes across multiple repositories.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Persistence.IRepository<TAggregate, TId>
files.Summary: Generic repository interface for aggregate roots.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.Choreography.CompensationAttribute
files.Summary: Marks a choreography handler class (or one of its HandleAsync overloads) as a compensation handler — i.e. it reacts to a "negative" event (refund, cancellation, failure) that semantically rolls back a previous "positive" event.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.Choreography.IChoreographyContext
files.Summary: Per-invocation context handed to a to publish forward or compensation events while preserving correlation identifiers across the chain.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.Choreography.IChoreographyRouter
files.Summary: Dispatches inbound integration events to all registered choreography handlers () of a matching event type. Wiring is typically done in DI via assembly-scanning extension methods.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.Choreography.IEventChoreography
files.Summary: Marker interface identifying a class as a participant in an event-driven choreography saga (the "Event Saga" flavor: no central orchestrator; services react to integration events and publish further events).

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.Choreography.IHandle<TEvent>
files.Summary: Handler contract for choreography saga participants. A class can implement several times, once per event type it reacts to.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.Choreography.IIntegrationEventPublisher
files.Summary: Underlying transport port used by to publish integration events. Compendium provides an in-memory implementation for tests; in production this is wired to a transactional outbox + message broker.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.Common.ISagaInstance
files.Summary: Marker interface for any persisted saga instance, regardless of flavor.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.Common.SagaStatus
files.Summary: Defines the possible states of a saga during its lifecycle. Shared by both (orchestration) and (choreography) flavors.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.Common.SagaStep
files.Summary: Represents a single step within an orchestration saga, including its execution state and metadata. Steps are owned by an and executed in declared order; compensation runs in reverse order.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.Common.SagaStepStatus
files.Summary: Defines the possible states of an orchestration saga step during its lifecycle. Used exclusively by ; choreography sagas have no concept of named "steps".

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.ProcessManagers.IProcessManager<TState>
files.Summary: Represents a process manager whose internal state is exposed via a strongly-typed state object. This is the primary base contract users will implement (typically by deriving from ProcessManager<TState> in Compendium.Application).

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.ProcessManagers.IProcessManager
files.Summary: Represents a DDD-style orchestration saga ("Process Manager" in Vaughn Vernon's terminology) — a stateful coordinator that groups operations across multiple aggregates within a bounded context, drives them through explicit steps, and performs compensation on failure.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.ProcessManagers.IProcessManagerOrchestrator
files.Summary: Drives the lifecycle of process managers: starts new instances, dispatches steps, and triggers compensation on failure.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.ProcessManagers.IProcessManagerRepository
files.Summary: Persistence port for instances. Adapters (e.g. PostgreSQL, in-memory) implement this contract.

files.Title: Compendium.Abstractions.Sagas.ProcessManagers.IProcessManagerStepExecutor
files.Summary: Defines the contract for executing and compensating individual process manager steps. Implementations issue commands to aggregates / external systems and report success or failure back to the orchestrator.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.AspNetCore.Health.HealthCheckExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for configuring health checks in ASP.NET Core applications.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.AspNetCore.Health.PostgreSqlHealthCheck
files.Summary: Health check for PostgreSQL database connectivity. Verifies database connection and performs a simple query.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.AspNetCore.Health.RedisHealthCheck
files.Summary: Health check for Redis connectivity. Verifies Redis connection and performs a PING command.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.AspNetCore.Security.SecurityExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for configuring security features in ASP.NET Core applications.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.AspNetCore.Security.SecurityHeadersMiddleware
files.Summary: Middleware that adds security headers to HTTP responses. Implements OWASP security best practices.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.AspNetCore.Security.SecurityHeadersOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for security headers middleware. Implements OWASP security best practices for HTTP headers.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.AspNetCore.Security.TenantValidationExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for configuring tenant validation.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.AspNetCore.Security.TenantValidationMiddleware
files.Summary: Middleware that validates tenant identity from multiple sources (header, subdomain, JWT) and ensures consistency before allowing the request to proceed.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.AspNetCore.Security.TenantValidationMiddlewareOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for tenant validation middleware.

files.Summary: Extension methods for registering LemonSqueezy adapter services.

files.Summary: Configuration options for the Listmonk email service adapter.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.Listmonk.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for registering Listmonk services in the dependency injection container.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.OpenRouter.Configuration.ModelConfig
files.Summary: Configuration for a specific model.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.OpenRouter.Configuration.OpenRouterOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for the OpenRouter AI provider.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.OpenRouter.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for configuring OpenRouter services.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.PostgreSQL.Configuration.PostgreSqlConnectionStringBuilder
files.Summary: Helper class for building PostgreSQL connection strings with optimized pooling parameters. Enhances base connection strings with Npgsql-specific pooling configuration.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.PostgreSQL.Configuration.PostgreSqlOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for PostgreSQL event store.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.PostgreSQL.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for registering PostgreSQL adapters in the dependency injection container.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.PostgreSQL.EventStore.PostgreSqlEventStore
files.Summary: PostgreSQL implementation of IEventStore using Dapper for high performance. Provides ACID compliance, optimistic concurrency control, and multi-tenancy support.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.PostgreSQL.EventStore.PostgreSqlStreamingEventStore
files.Summary: PostgreSQL implementation of IStreamingEventStore with optimized streaming capabilities for projections. Extends the base PostgreSqlEventStore with efficient streaming methods.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.PostgreSQL.Projections.PostgreSqlProjectionCheckpointStore
files.Summary: PostgreSQL implementation of IProjectionCheckpointStore for per-aggregate projection checkpointing. Stores checkpoint positions with composite key (projection_id, aggregate_id) for independent rebuild tracking.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.PostgreSQL.Projections.PostgreSqlProjectionStore
files.Summary: PostgreSQL implementation of IProjectionStore with optimized checkpoint and snapshot management.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.PostgreSQL.Sagas.DependencyInjection.PostgreSqlSagaServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: DI helpers to wire the PostgreSQL implementation.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.PostgreSQL.Sagas.PostgresProcessManagerRepository
files.Summary: PostgreSQL implementation of . Persists process-manager metadata, a JSON snapshot of state (best-effort, optional), and the per-step status table. Multi-tenant aware via .

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.PostgreSQL.Security.RowLevelSecurityExtensions
files.Summary:
Extension methods for PostgreSQL Row-Level Security (RLS) support. COMP-023: Multi-Tenancy Security Hardening

These extensions provide defense-in-depth security by setting database-level tenant context for RLS policies. RLS provides protection against:

  • Application bugs that bypass tenant filtering
  • Direct database access (admin tools, reporting)
  • SQL injection attacks

IMPORTANT: RLS is an OPTIONAL security enhancement. The Compendium framework already enforces 100% tenant isolation at the application level.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.Redis.Configuration.RedisOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for Redis connections and behavior.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.Redis.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for registering Redis adapters in the dependency injection container.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.Redis.Idempotency.RedisIdempotencyStore
files.Summary: Redis implementation of IIdempotencyStore for distributed idempotency tracking. Provides high-performance, distributed storage for operation results with configurable TTL. All infrastructure failures (Redis connection, serialization, timeouts) are surfaced via failures rather than exceptions, matching the Compendium Result pattern.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.Redis.Projections.RedisProjectionCheckpointStore
files.Summary: Redis implementation of IProjectionCheckpointStore for high-performance projection checkpointing. Uses Redis hash sets to store checkpoint positions with automatic expiration support.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.Stripe.Configuration.StripeOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for the Stripe billing adapter.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.Stripe.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for registering the Stripe billing adapter services.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.Zitadel.Authentication.ZitadelClaimsTransformation
files.Summary: Transforms Zitadel-specific claims into standard claims for the application. This enables mapping of Zitadel organization IDs to tenant contexts.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.Zitadel.Configuration.ZitadelEndUserOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for the Zitadel End-User adapter.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.Zitadel.Configuration.ZitadelOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for the Zitadel adapter.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.Zitadel.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for registering Zitadel services in the dependency injection container.

files.Title: Compendium.Adapters.Zitadel.Health.ZitadelHealthCheck
files.Summary: Health check for Zitadel Identity Provider connectivity. Verifies the OIDC discovery endpoint is accessible and configuration is valid.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.CQRS.Behaviors.IPipelineBehavior<TRequest, TResponse>
files.Summary: Defines a pipeline behavior that can be used to add cross-cutting concerns such as validation, logging, caching, or authorization to request handling.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.CQRS.Behaviors.IdempotencyBehavior<TRequest, TResponse>
files.Summary: Pipeline behavior that provides idempotency for command processing. Prevents duplicate command execution by caching results and checking for previously processed commands.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.CQRS.Behaviors.LoggingBehavior<TRequest, TResponse>
files.Summary: Pipeline behavior that provides comprehensive logging for request processing. Logs request start, completion, performance metrics, and any failures.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.CQRS.Behaviors.RequestHandlerDelegate<TResponse>
files.Summary: Represents a delegate for the next handler in the request pipeline.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.CQRS.Behaviors.TransactionBehavior<TRequest, TResponse>
files.Summary: Pipeline behavior that wraps command execution in a database transaction. Provides automatic rollback on failures and commit on success. Only applies to commands that modify data (ICommand implementations).

files.Title: Compendium.Application.CQRS.Behaviors.ValidationBehavior<TRequest, TResponse>
files.Summary: Pipeline behavior that validates requests using data annotations before processing. Automatically converts validation failures to appropriate Result types.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.CQRS.CommandDispatcher
files.Summary: Default implementation of the command dispatcher that uses dependency injection to resolve command handlers and execute commands with proper error handling and pipeline behaviors.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.CQRS.ICommandDispatcher
files.Summary: Defines a dispatcher for executing commands through their corresponding handlers. Provides a central entry point for command execution with error handling.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.CQRS.IQueryDispatcher
files.Summary: Defines a dispatcher for executing queries through their corresponding handlers. Provides a central entry point for query execution with error handling.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.CQRS.QueryDispatcher
files.Summary: Default implementation of the query dispatcher that uses dependency injection to resolve query handlers and execute queries with proper error handling.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.EventHandlers.IDomainEventHandler<TEvent>
files.Summary: Handles a domain event of type TEvent.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Idempotency.HashBasedDeduplicationStrategy
files.Summary: A deduplication strategy that generates keys by serializing the entire request object to JSON and computing a SHA256 hash of the serialized content.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Idempotency.IDeduplicationStrategy
files.Summary: Defines a strategy for generating unique keys from request objects for deduplication and idempotency purposes.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Idempotency.IIdempotencyService
files.Summary: Provides idempotency capabilities to ensure operations are executed only once. Allows storing and retrieving operation results to prevent duplicate processing.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Idempotency.IIdempotencyStore
files.Summary: Defines the storage contract for idempotency data. Implementations should provide persistent storage for operation tracking.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Idempotency.IdempotencyService
files.Summary: Default implementation of the idempotency service that uses an underlying store to track processed operations and their results.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Idempotency.PropertyBasedDeduplicationStrategy
files.Summary: A deduplication strategy that generates keys based on specific properties of the request object. Only the specified properties are used to compute the hash, providing more targeted deduplication.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Saga.ISaga<TData>
files.Summary: Represents a saga with associated data of type TData.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Saga.ISaga
files.Summary: Represents a saga (distributed transaction) that coordinates multiple operations with compensation capabilities for failure handling.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Saga.ISagaFactory<TSaga, TData>
files.Summary: Defines a factory for creating saga instances with associated data.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Saga.ISagaOrchestrator
files.Summary: Orchestrates the execution of sagas, managing their lifecycle, step execution, and compensation.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Saga.ISagaRepository
files.Summary: Defines the contract for saga persistence operations.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Saga.ISagaStepExecutor
files.Summary: Defines the contract for executing and compensating saga steps.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Saga.SagaOrchestrator
files.Summary: Default implementation of the saga orchestrator that manages saga lifecycle and coordination.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Saga.SagaStatus
files.Summary: Defines the possible states of a saga during its lifecycle.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Saga.SagaStep
files.Summary: Represents a single step within a saga, including its execution state and metadata.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Saga.SagaStepStatus
files.Summary: Defines the possible states of a saga step during its lifecycle.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Sagas.Choreography.ChoreographyRouter
files.Summary: Default that resolves all registered implementations from DI and dispatches the event to each. Failures from individual handlers are aggregated into a single error.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Sagas.Choreography.InMemoryIntegrationEventPublisher
files.Summary: In-memory intended for tests, samples, and quick prototypes. Buffers published events for inspection and optionally re-routes them through a for end-to-end fan-out.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Sagas.DependencyInjection.SagaServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: DI registration helpers for both saga flavors.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Sagas.ProcessManagers.IMutableProcessManager
files.Summary: Internal seam used by repositories to push status updates onto a process manager instance held in memory. Implemented by ; not intended for user code.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Sagas.ProcessManagers.InMemoryProcessManagerRepository
files.Summary: In-memory intended for tests and quick prototyping. State is process-local and lost on restart — production code should use a durable adapter (e.g. Compendium.Adapters.PostgreSQL).

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Sagas.ProcessManagers.ProcessManager<TState>
files.Summary: Base class for DDD-style orchestration sagas (Process Managers). Subclass this to declare a saga's steps and state shape; the drives execution and compensation.

files.Title: Compendium.Application.Sagas.ProcessManagers.ProcessManagerOrchestrator
files.Summary: Default implementation. Persists the saga via and delegates step execution / compensation to .

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.DomainEventBase
files.Summary: Base class for domain events providing common properties and behavior.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.IDomainEvent
files.Summary: Represents a domain event that occurred within the domain. Domain events are used to communicate changes within the same bounded context.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.IIntegrationEvent
files.Summary: Represents an integration event that is published across bounded contexts. Integration events are used for communication between different bounded contexts or external systems.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a campaign is sent.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a license is revoked.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.Integration.LicenseValidatedEvent
files.Summary: Integration event raised when a license is validated.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a list is created.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.Integration.ListDeletedEvent
files.Summary: Integration event raised when a list is deleted.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.Integration.OrganizationUpdatedEvent
files.Summary: Integration event raised when an organization is updated.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.Integration.PaymentSucceededEvent
files.Summary: Integration event raised when a payment succeeds.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.Integration.RefundIssuedEvent
files.Summary: Integration event raised when a refund is issued.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a subscriber's attributes are updated.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a subscriber subscribes to a newsletter list.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.Integration.SubscriberUnsubscribedEvent

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a subscription is created.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a subscription is paused.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a subscription is updated.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a tenant is reactivated.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when tenant settings are updated.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.Integration.TenantSuspendedEvent
files.Summary: Integration event raised when a tenant is suspended.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a tenant is updated.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a user is added to a tenant.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a user is removed from a tenant.

files.Summary: Integration event raised when a user logs out.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.Integration.UserRoleAssignedEvent
files.Summary: Integration event raised when a role is assigned to a user.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.Integration.UserRoleRemovedEvent
files.Summary: Integration event raised when a role is removed from a user.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.Integration.UserUnlockedEvent

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.Integration.UserUpdatedEvent

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Events.IntegrationEventBase
files.Summary: Base class for integration events providing common properties and behavior. Integration events are used for communication between different bounded contexts or external systems.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Primitives.AggregateRoot<TId>
files.Summary: Base class for aggregate roots in the domain. Provides domain event management and optimistic concurrency control.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Primitives.Entity<TId>
files.Summary: Base class for all entities in the domain. Provides identity, timestamps, and business rule validation.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Primitives.ILockingStrategy
files.Summary: Defines a strategy for locking operations in aggregate roots. Enables different locking approaches based on performance requirements.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Primitives.ModernLockStrategy
files.Summary: Modern locking strategy using .NET 9's new Lock type. Provides improved performance over traditional lock statements. Note: For async operations, falls back to SemaphoreSlim due to Lock limitations.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Primitives.NoLockStrategy
files.Summary: No-locking strategy that provides maximum performance for single-threaded scenarios. WARNING: Should only be used when thread safety is guaranteed by external means.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Primitives.ReaderWriterLockStrategy
files.Summary: Reader-writer locking strategy that allows concurrent reads but exclusive writes. Optimal for scenarios with high read-to-write ratios.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Primitives.ValueObject
files.Summary: Base class for value objects in the domain. Provides structural equality based on component values.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Rules.BusinessRuleValidationException
files.Summary: Exception thrown when a business rule validation fails. This exception should be caught at the application boundary and converted to appropriate error responses.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Rules.IBusinessRule
files.Summary: Represents a business rule that can be validated within the domain. Business rules encapsulate domain logic and invariants that must be maintained.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Specifications.ISpecification<T>
files.Summary: Represents a specification that can be used to filter entities. Specifications encapsulate query logic and can be combined using logical operators.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Domain.Specifications.Specification<T>
files.Summary: Base class for specifications providing common functionality and composition methods.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.Attributes.AutoRegisterEventAttribute
files.Summary: Marks a domain event type for automatic registration in the event type registry. This attribute is used by source generators to create compile-time safe event registration.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.Attributes.EventRegistryAssemblyAttribute
files.Summary: Marks an assembly for automatic event type registration scanning. This attribute is used by source generators to identify assemblies containing domain events.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.EventTypeMetadata
files.Summary: Metadata about a registered event type.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.EventTypeRegistry
files.Summary: Thread-safe registry for whitelisted event types using .NET 9 frozen collections for optimal performance. Prevents deserialization attacks by maintaining a strict whitelist of allowed domain event types.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.EventUpcasterBase<TSource, TTarget>
files.Summary: Abstract base class for event upcasters. Provides common implementation of the non-generic IEventUpcaster interface.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.EventVersionMigrator
files.Summary: Manages event version migrations using registered upcasters. Applies a chain of upcasters to migrate events from old versions to the latest schema.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.IEventDeserializer
files.Summary: Secure event deserializer that prevents deserialization attacks using whitelisted types.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.IEventTypeRegistry
files.Summary: Registry for whitelisted event types to prevent deserialization attacks.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.IEventUpcaster<TSource, TTarget>
files.Summary: Interface for upcasting events from an old schema version to a new version. Event upcasters enable schema evolution while maintaining backward compatibility.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.IEventUpcaster
files.Summary: Non-generic interface for event upcasters. Used for registration and discovery of upcasters at runtime.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.IEventVersionMigrator
files.Summary: Interface for the event version migrator service.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.IGeneratedEventRegistry
files.Summary: Interface for generated event registry implementations. Source generators implement this interface to provide compile-time safe event registration.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.EventSourcing.SecureEventDeserializer
files.Summary: Secure event deserializer that prevents deserialization attacks by using a whitelist-based approach. Only registered domain event types can be deserialized, preventing arbitrary code execution. Automatically applies event version migrations using registered upcasters.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Results.Error
files.Summary: Represents an error that occurred during operation execution. Provides structured error information with code, message, and optional details.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Results.ErrorType
files.Summary: Defines the types of errors that can occur.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Results.Result<TValue>
files.Summary: Represents the result of an operation that can either succeed with a value or fail.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Results.Result
files.Summary: Represents the result of an operation that can either succeed or fail. Provides a functional approach to error handling without exceptions.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Results.ResultExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for the Result types providing functional programming patterns.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Telemetry.CompendiumTelemetry.CacheResults
files.Summary: Tag values for cache operation results.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Telemetry.CompendiumTelemetry.CqrsActivities
files.Summary: Activity names for CQRS operations.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Telemetry.CompendiumTelemetry.EventStoreActivities
files.Summary: Activity names for EventStore operations.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Telemetry.CompendiumTelemetry.IdempotencyActivities
files.Summary: Activity names for Idempotency operations.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Telemetry.CompendiumTelemetry.ProjectionActivities
files.Summary: Activity names for Projection operations.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Telemetry.CompendiumTelemetry.StatusValues
files.Summary: Tag values for status.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Telemetry.CompendiumTelemetry.Tags
files.Summary: Common tag keys for consistent tagging across all metrics and traces.

files.Title: Compendium.Core.Telemetry.CompendiumTelemetry
files.Summary: Provides centralized OpenTelemetry instrumentation for Compendium framework. Defines ActivitySource for distributed tracing and Meter for metrics collection. Target overhead: < 5% performance impact.

files.Title: Compendium.Extensions.ExternalAdapters.ExternalAdaptersConfigurationSections
files.Summary: Configuration section names for external adapters.

files.Title: Compendium.Extensions.ExternalAdapters.ExternalAdaptersOptions
files.Summary: Unified configuration options for all external adapters.

files.Title: Compendium.Extensions.ExternalAdapters.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for registering all external adapter services.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.IProjection
files.Summary: Interface for projections that handle domain events.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.IProjectionCheckpointStore
files.Summary: Interface for persisting projection checkpoints.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.IProjectionManager
files.Summary: Interface for managing projections and read models.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.InMemoryEventStore
files.Summary: In-memory implementation of IEventStore for testing and development purposes. Provides thread-safe event storage with multi-tenancy support and comprehensive functionality.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.InMemorySnapshotStore
files.Summary: In-memory implementation of ISnapshotStore for testing and development purposes. Provides thread-safe snapshot storage with multi-tenancy support.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.IntervalSnapshotStrategy
files.Summary: A snapshot strategy that takes snapshots at regular intervals based on event count.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.NoSnapshotStrategy
files.Summary: A snapshot strategy that never takes snapshots. This is the default strategy when no snapshot store is configured.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.ProjectionBase<TEvent, TState>
files.Summary: Base class for projections that handle specific event types.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.ProjectionDetails
files.Summary: Details about a specific projection.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.ProjectionManager
files.Summary: Manages projections and read models for event sourcing. Provides thread-safe projection processing and rebuilding capabilities.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.ProjectionManagerStatistics
files.Summary: Statistics about the projection manager.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.ProjectionRebuildProgress
files.Summary: Represents progress information during projection rebuild.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.EventSourcing.SnapshotStoreStatistics
files.Summary: Statistics about the snapshot store.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.CorrelationIdProvider
files.Summary: Default implementation of correlation ID provider using AsyncLocal for thread-safe storage. Maintains correlation IDs per async context, ensuring proper isolation in concurrent scenarios.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.CorrelationIdScope
files.Summary: Provides a disposable scope for temporarily setting a correlation ID. When disposed, restores the previous correlation ID, enabling nested correlation contexts.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.ICorrelationIdProvider
files.Summary: Provides functionality for managing correlation IDs across request contexts. Correlation IDs help track requests across distributed systems and services.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.IMetrics
files.Summary: Interface for collecting application metrics.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.ITraceSpan
files.Summary: Represents a trace span that tracks the execution of an operation within a distributed trace.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.ITracing
files.Summary: Interface for distributed tracing operations.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.InMemoryMetrics
files.Summary: In-memory implementation of metrics collection for development and testing purposes. Stores metric data in memory without external dependencies.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.InMemoryTracing
files.Summary: In-memory implementation of tracing for testing and development scenarios. Stores trace spans in memory without external dependencies.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.Logging.EventSourcingContext
files.Summary: Provides thread-safe storage for event sourcing context information using AsyncLocal. This allows automatic enrichment of logs with event sourcing metadata.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.Logging.EventSourcingLogEnricher
files.Summary: Serilog enricher that adds event sourcing context properties to log events. Enriches logs with AggregateId, TenantId, EventType, and CorrelationId from the current context.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.Logging.LoggingExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for ILogger that provide convenient logging methods with event sourcing context enrichment.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.Logging.SerilogConfiguration
files.Summary:
Provides configuration for Serilog structured logging with support for:

  • Console output (development)
  • File output with rotation (production)
  • Seq sink for centralized logging
  • Thread, environment, and process enrichers
  • Correlation ID enrichment
  • Event sourcing context enrichment

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.Logging.SerilogHostBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for configuring Serilog on IHostBuilder.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.MetricEntry
files.Summary: Represents a metric entry with its type, value, tags, and metadata.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.MetricType
files.Summary: Defines the types of metrics that can be collected.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.MetricsCollector
files.Summary: Production-ready metrics collector using System.Diagnostics.Metrics.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.TraceEvent
files.Summary: Represents an event that occurred during the execution of a trace span.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.TraceSpanStatus
files.Summary: Defines the possible status values for a trace span.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Observability.TracingService
files.Summary: Production-ready tracing service using System.Diagnostics.Activity.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.EnhancedProjectionManager
files.Summary: Enhanced projection manager with advanced rebuild capabilities, progress tracking, and performance optimization.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.EventData
files.Summary: Event data with metadata for projection processing.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.EventMetadata
files.Summary: Metadata associated with an event for projection processing. Contains positioning, timing, and context information.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.Examples.CustomerStatsProjection
files.Summary: Example projection that tracks customer statistics. Demonstrates aggregation and analytics capabilities.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.Examples.OrderSummaryProjection
files.Summary: Example projection that maintains order summaries for quick lookups. Demonstrates how to build read models from domain events.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.ILiveProjectionProcessor
files.Summary: Interface for live projection processing service.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.IProjection<TEvent>
files.Summary: Strongly-typed projection interface for handling specific event types.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.IProjection
files.Summary: Base interface for all projections that handle domain events.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.IProjectionManager
files.Summary: Interface for managing projections with advanced rebuild and progress tracking capabilities.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.IProjectionStore
files.Summary: Interface for projection storage operations. Handles checkpoint persistence and snapshot storage for efficient projection rebuilds.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.IStreamingEventStore
files.Summary: Extended event store interface that supports streaming operations for projections.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.LiveProcessingStatus
files.Summary: Status information for live projection processing.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.LiveProjectionProcessor
files.Summary: Background service for processing projections as events arrive in real-time. Maintains projection state and ensures eventual consistency.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.ProjectionManagerStatistics
files.Summary: Statistics about the projection manager and all its projections.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.ProjectionOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for projection management and processing.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.ProjectionState
files.Summary: Represents the current state and metadata of a projection.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.ProjectionStatus
files.Summary: Enumeration of possible projection statuses.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.RebuildProgress
files.Summary: Progress information for projection rebuild operations. Provides real-time feedback on the rebuild process including performance metrics.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Projections.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for configuring projection services in DI container.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Repositories.EventSourcedRepository<TAggregate, TId>
files.Summary: Base repository implementation for event-sourced aggregates with optional snapshot support. This repository works perfectly without snapshots and adds them as a pure performance optimization.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.CircuitBreaker
files.Summary: Default implementation of a circuit breaker that tracks failures and manages state transitions. Provides protection against cascading failures by temporarily blocking requests to failing services.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.CircuitBreakerOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for circuit breaker behavior.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.CircuitBreakerRegistry
files.Summary: Registry for managing multiple circuit breakers by name. Provides a centralized way to create and access circuit breakers across the application.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.CircuitBreakerState
files.Summary: Defines the possible states of a circuit breaker.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.ExponentialBackoffDelayStrategy
files.Summary: A delay strategy that implements exponential backoff with jitter. Delay increases exponentially with each retry attempt to reduce load on failing services.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.FixedDelayStrategy
files.Summary: A delay strategy that uses a fixed delay between all retry attempts.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.ICircuitBreaker
files.Summary: Provides circuit breaker functionality to prevent cascading failures in distributed systems. Monitors operation failures and temporarily blocks requests when failure thresholds are exceeded.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.IDelayStrategy
files.Summary: Defines a strategy for calculating delays between retry attempts.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.IRateLimiter
files.Summary: Provides rate limiting functionality to control the rate of requests or operations. Helps prevent system overload and ensures fair resource usage.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.IRetryPolicy
files.Summary: Provides retry functionality for operations that may fail transiently. Automatically retries failed operations based on configurable policies.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.PollyResilienceOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for Polly resilience pipelines.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.PollyResiliencePipelineFactory
files.Summary: Factory for creating Polly resilience pipelines with circuit breaker, retry, and timeout policies. Provides pre-configured pipelines for common infrastructure components like PostgreSQL and Redis.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.RateLimitOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for rate limiting behavior.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.ResilienceTelemetryListener
files.Summary: Telemetry listener for resilience pipeline events. Collects metrics for monitoring circuit breaker state, retry attempts, and timeouts.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.RetryOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for retry behavior.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.RetryPolicy
files.Summary: Default implementation of retry policy that supports configurable retry strategies, delay strategies, and retry conditions.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for registering resilience services in the dependency injection container.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Resilience.TokenBucketRateLimiter
files.Summary: Token bucket algorithm implementation of rate limiter. Maintains a bucket of tokens for each key, refilling at a steady rate and consuming tokens for requests.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Security.AesEncryptionService
files.Summary: AES-based encryption service that provides secure encryption, decryption, and hashing operations. Uses AES-256 encryption with randomly generated initialization vectors for enhanced security.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Security.EncryptionOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for encryption services. Contains the encryption key and salt used for cryptographic operations.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Security.IEncryptionService
files.Summary: Interface for encryption and hashing services. Provides secure encryption, decryption, hashing, and hash verification operations.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Security.IKeyVault
files.Summary: Interface for secure key vault operations. Provides functionality to securely store, retrieve, and manage secrets.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Security.InMemoryKeyVault
files.Summary: In-memory implementation of a key vault for development and testing purposes. Stores encrypted secrets in memory with optional expiration support.

files.Title: Compendium.Infrastructure.Telemetry.OpenTelemetryServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for configuring OpenTelemetry in Compendium framework. Provides fluent API for adding traces, metrics, and exporters.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.CompositeTenantResolver
files.Summary: A composite tenant resolver that tries multiple resolution strategies in sequence. Returns the result from the first resolver that successfully identifies a tenant.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.DatabaseIsolationOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for database-level tenant isolation strategy.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.DatabaseIsolationStrategy
files.Summary: Implements tenant isolation by providing each tenant with a separate database. This strategy offers the highest level of isolation but requires more database resources.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.Extensions.HttpClientBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for adding tenant propagation to HTTP clients.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.Extensions.InMemoryTenantStoreOptions
files.Summary: Options for the in-memory tenant store.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.Extensions.MultitenancyOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for multitenancy.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.Extensions.ServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for registering multitenancy services.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.HeaderTenantResolver
files.Summary: A tenant resolver that identifies tenants based on HTTP headers. Looks for tenant identifier in a specified header and resolves the tenant from storage.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.HeaderTenantResolverOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for header-based tenant resolution.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.HostTenantResolver
files.Summary: A tenant resolver that identifies tenants based on the request host/domain. Can resolve tenants from subdomains or full domain names.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.HostTenantResolverOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for host-based tenant resolution.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.Http.TenantPropagatingDelegatingHandler
files.Summary: An HTTP message handler that propagates tenant context to outgoing requests. Adds tenant-related headers to all outgoing HTTP requests.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.Http.TenantPropagationOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for tenant context propagation.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.ITenantConsistencyValidator
files.Summary: Validates that tenant identifiers from multiple sources are consistent. Ensures header, subdomain, and JWT claim all reference the same tenant.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.ITenantContext
files.Summary: Provides access to the current tenant context information. Enables applications to operate in a multi-tenant environment by tracking the active tenant.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.ITenantContextAccessor
files.Summary: Provides access to the current tenant context in a thread-safe manner. This is the primary interface for reading tenant information from any layer.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.ITenantContextSetter
files.Summary: Provides access to the tenant context and allows modification. This interface is used by middleware and tenant resolution components.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.ITenantIsolationStrategy
files.Summary: Defines a strategy for isolating tenant data in a multi-tenant application. Implementations determine how tenants are separated at the database level.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.ITenantResolver
files.Summary: Defines a strategy for resolving tenant information from request context. Implementations can resolve tenants from various sources like headers, domains, or paths.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.ITenantStore
files.Summary: Defines the contract for storing and retrieving tenant information. Provides persistent storage capabilities for multi-tenant applications.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.IsolationLevel
files.Summary: Defines the levels of data isolation supported in multi-tenant applications.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.JwtClaimTenantResolver
files.Summary: A tenant resolver that identifies tenants based on JWT claims. Extracts tenant identifier from a specified claim in the authenticated user's token.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.JwtClaimTenantResolverOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for JWT claim-based tenant resolution.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.SchemaIsolationOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for schema-level tenant isolation strategy.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.SchemaIsolationStrategy
files.Summary: Implements tenant isolation by providing each tenant with a separate schema within a shared database. This strategy balances isolation with resource efficiency.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.Stores.InMemoryTenantStore
files.Summary: An in-memory implementation of the tenant store for development and testing.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.TenantConsistencyOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for tenant consistency validation.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.TenantConsistencyValidator
files.Summary: Default implementation of .

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.TenantContext
files.Summary: Default implementation of tenant context using AsyncLocal for thread-safe tenant isolation. Maintains tenant information per async context, ensuring proper isolation in concurrent scenarios.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.TenantContextAccessor
files.Summary: Default implementation of the tenant context accessor. Uses AsyncLocal to maintain tenant context per async context.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.TenantErrors
files.Summary: Standard tenant-related errors.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.TenantInfo
files.Summary: Represents information about a tenant in a multi-tenant application. Contains all necessary data to identify and configure tenant-specific behavior.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.TenantResolutionContext
files.Summary: Contains context information used for tenant resolution. Aggregates various request properties that tenant resolvers can use to identify tenants.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.TenantScope
files.Summary: Provides a disposable scope for temporarily setting a tenant context. When disposed, restores the previous tenant context, enabling nested tenant contexts.

files.Title: Compendium.Multitenancy.TenantSourceIdentifiers
files.Summary: Contains tenant identifiers from various sources for consistency validation.

files.Title: Compendium.Testing.TestHelpers.ApplicationTestHelpers
files.Summary: Test helpers for application layer testing

files.Title: Compendium.Testing.TestHelpers.InMemoryTestStore
files.Summary: In-memory store for testing idempotency
